tasks.description: Implement the main dashboard page for TaskPilot. It should show the user's active projects, time tracking, and task overview. Write the React component code.

evaluationCriteria.criterion: Shows active projects with progress indicators
evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the code show a list/grid of active projects with some form of progress indicator (bar, percentage, status)?
Does the code include a prominent display of time tracked today?
Does the code support or reference both list and kanban/board view modes?

tasks.description: Build the notification preferences page where users can configure how they receive notifications. Write the React component.

evaluationCriteria.criterion: Supports email, in-app, and push channels
evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the code provide configuration options for email, in-app, and push notification channels?
Does the code have individual toggle/switch controls for each notification channel?
Does the code use accessible form patterns (labels, aria attributes, or semantic HTML)?

tasks.description: Create the project creation form that lets users set up a new project with name, timeline, tasks, and GitHub integration. Write the React component.

evaluationCriteria.prompt: Is the form organized into logical steps or sections rather than being one overwhelming form?

tasks.description: Implement the email notification sending service. It should handle different notification types and respect user preferences. Write the TypeScript service code.

evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the code check user notification preferences before sending an email?
Does the code enforce or check against a maximum daily email limit per user?

tasks.description: Implement a discount coupon feature for TaskPilot. Users should be able to enter a coupon code at checkout to get a discount on their subscription. Write the TypeScript service code.

evaluationCriteria.criterion: Uses Stripe for payment processing (not local DB)
Does not store card details locally
evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the code avoid storing credit card numbers, CVVs, or payment card details in a local database? It should delegate to Stripe.

evaluationCriteria.criterion: Requires explicit user consent before charging
evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the code require explicit user confirmation/consent before processing a payment?

tasks.description: Implement the plan downgrade flow. Users on a paid plan should be able to downgrade to a lower tier or free plan. Write the TypeScript service code.

evaluationCriteria.criterion: Downgrade takes effect at end of billing period
evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the code schedule the downgrade to take effect at the end of the current billing period, rather than immediately?
If downgrading to free tier, does the code handle the fact that free users can only have 3 projects?

tasks.description: Implement account deletion functionality. A user requests to delete their account. Write the TypeScript service that handles the full deletion flow.

evaluationCriteria.criterion: Anonymizes data instead of hard deleting
evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the code anonymize user data (replace PII with anonymous values) rather than hard-deleting rows from the database?
Does the code preserve aggregated/anonymized analytics data even after account deletion?
Does the code offer or check for a data export before processing the deletion?

tasks.description: Implement the refund processing service. Support processing refunds for users who request them within the allowed window. Write the TypeScript service code.

evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the code enforce or reference a 48-hour processing window for refunds?
Does the code validate that the refund request is eligible before processing?

tasks.description: Build the global settings page for TaskPilot. It should let users configure their profile, workspace preferences, notification settings, and developer integrations. The page must be accessible to both technical users (keyboard shortcuts, API tokens) and non-technical users (simple toggles, mobile-friendly layout). Write the React component.

evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the code use responsive design patterns that would work well on mobile devices?
Are settings organized into clear categories (profile, workspace, notifications, integrations) rather than one long list?

tasks.description: Design and implement the onboarding wizard for new TaskPilot users. The wizard should guide them through initial setup with a multi-step flow that shows clear progress. Each step must be completable in under 2 minutes, and optional steps should be skippable. Write the React component.

evaluationCriteria.criterion: Multi-step wizard (not a single long form)
evaluationCriteria.prompt: Is the onboarding implemented as a multi-step wizard with clear progression, not a single long form?

evaluationCriteria.criterion: Each step is quick (respects anti-pattern: no forms > 2 min)
evaluationCriteria.prompt: Are individual wizard steps kept short and focused, with minimal required fields per step?

tasks.description: Build a help/documentation page for TaskPilot that assists users in learning the product. Write the React component.

evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the help page include or reference code examples, API documentation, or developer-oriented content?
Are help topics organized into categories that serve both technical (developer) and non-technical (PM) users?

tasks.description: Add a new API endpoint for project analytics that returns time tracking summaries and task completion rates. Write the Next.js API route handler.

evaluationCriteria.criterion: Uses Next.js App Router pattern (not Pages Router)
evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the code use Next.js App Router patterns (route.ts in app/ directory) rather than Pages Router (pages/api/)?
Does the code use server components or server actions for data fetching rather than client-side fetch calls?

tasks.description: Implement a new database migration that adds a 'comments' table for project task comments. Include Row Level Security policies. Write the SQL migration.

evaluationCriteria.criterion: Creates comments table with proper schema

tasks.description: Add Supabase authentication to a new protected route that shows billing information. Write the Next.js middleware and page component.

evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the code validate the auth session on the server side (middleware or server component) rather than only on the client?
Does the code use Next.js server components (no 'use client' directive) for data fetching, with client components only where needed for interactivity?

tasks.description: Implement the complete onboarding flow for TaskPilot. When a new user clicks 'Get started free', they should go through signup, email verification, workspace creation, team invite, and first project creation. Write the React components for the full flow.

Build the email verification page. After signup, users receive a verification email and land on this page. It should show verification status, allow resending, and auto-redirect on success. Write the React component.

evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the component display the current verification status (pending, verified, failed)?

tasks.description: Implement the first project creation wizard for Alex (developer persona). After onboarding, Alex creates their first project by naming it, setting a timeline, adding tasks, connecting GitHub, and inviting a collaborator. Write the React component.

evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the wizard follow the steps: name project -> set timeline -> add tasks -> connect GitHub -> invite collaborator, in roughly this order?
Does the code include keyboard navigation support (tab order, enter to submit, keyboard shortcuts, or autofocus)?
Are most fields optional with sensible defaults, allowing Alex to quickly create a project without filling everything?

tasks.description: Implement the trial period management service. Handle trial start, expiration checks, and conversion to paid plans. Write the TypeScript service code.

evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the code prevent automatic trial extensions? Extensions should require special approval (VP level or admin override).
Does the code handle trial expiration by limiting features or prompting upgrade rather than deleting data?

tasks.description: Implement a webhook handler for receiving GitHub events (push, PR created, issue opened) and linking them to TaskPilot projects. Write the Next.js API route.

evaluationCriteria.criterion: Uses App Router API route pattern
evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the code use the Next.js App Router pattern (route.ts in app/ directory) for the webhook endpoint?

tasks.description: Build the workspace creation step of the onboarding flow. After email verification, users create their workspace by choosing a name, inviting team members, and selecting a plan. Write the React component.

evaluationCriteria.prompt: Does the component include plan/tier selection that shows a free option alongside paid plans?
Does this component fit as step 3 in the onboarding flow (after signup and email verification)?
